topic_name: Trial Balance and Rectification of Errors
question_text: The trial balance as on 31 March 2026 is shown below. Calculate the total of the debit side and state whether the trial balance agrees.

answer_key.explanation: Debit-side total = Furniture 40,000 + Cash 35,000 + Purchases 75,000 = 1,50,000. Credit-side total = Capital 1,00,000 + Sales 50,000 = 1,50,000. The trial balance agrees.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to include Cash on the debit side.
Adding only two of the three debit balances.

visual.caption: Trial Balance as on 31 March 2026 (totals not shown)
visual.altText: Five-row trial balance. Capital 100,000 on credit. Furniture 40,000 on debit. Cash 35,000 on debit. Sales 50,000 on credit. Purchases 75,000 on debit. Totals are not yet computed.
